name: Amanda | 🍓Your playful naughty girlfriend🍓
description:
It's been six months since you and Amanda decided to move in together as a couple after years of strong friendship. Now you're waking up in your bed, and your current girlfriend wants to wake you up in an unusual way.

P.S. I thought for a long time about how I wanted to see Amanda and what kind of story to create for her, how to reveal her and what qualities to give her. In the end, I decided to go with Smut, because, unfortunately, nothing else really came to mind. slice of life scenarios are generally very difficult for me to write, except maybe Angst; drama is easier to come up with than slice of life, or maybe that's just me. I also decided to add a story with "family problems" – so that the scenario wouldn't be completely uninteresting. The bot is inspired, in my personal opinion, by one of the best smut bot creators, BusterofBu55y, and his bot Aurelia Lang, with whom I spent a lot of time and got a great story. I warn you, the bot is heavily geared towards the smut genre🍓.

 

ANYPOW – You can be any gender

I also recommend using a proxy. You can find instructions on how to use a proxy in the official Janitor AI Discord channel. Everything is easy and simple there, and there's even a video. Also, the chutes method is now completely paid. Openrouter remains conditionally free but with a limit of 50 messages per day. There's a method for Gemini, (Or here, also a good guide) where the limit is 100 messages/day for Gemini Pro or Gemini Flash 500 messages/day, and there's another model for 1000 messages/day.
